annotations.grafana.app/message: show cached and total followed users inside cache gauge

spec.rawSql:
SELECT extract(epoch from max(lastsync) - min(lastsync))/3600 
FROM (SELECT unnest(followings) as follow FROM followers GROUP BY follow) AS f 
INNER JOIN twitter_users ON f.follow=twitter_users.id
WHERE (NOW() - twitter_users.extradata['latest_post_date']::TEXT::date) < INTERVAL '6 weeks'

SELECT (extract(epoch from max(lastsync) - min(lastsync))/3600)/24 FROM (SELECT unnest(followings_instagram) as follow FROM followers WHERE host='r.town' GROUP BY follow) AS f 
INNER JOIN instagram_users ON f.follow=instagram_users.id
WHERE instagram_users.extradata['latest_post_date'] is not null

spec.title: Twitter profile cache update calls by result
Followed Twitter users cached
spec.description: Percent of distinct followed Twitter accounts whose database cache is non-null. The gauge arc shows cache coverage, while the in-panel label shows cached users versus total followed users.

spec.rawSql: WITH followed AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE followings IS NOT NULL) SELECT NOW() AS "time", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.cache IS NOT NULL)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value, CONCAT(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.cache IS NOT NULL), ' / ', COUNT(*), ' cached') AS metric FROM twitter_users tu JOIN followed f ON f.user_id = tu.id;

WITH twitter_followed AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE followings IS NOT NULL), twitter_vip AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE host = 'r.town' AND followings IS NOT NULL), instagram_followed AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings_instagram) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE followings_instagram IS NOT NULL), instagram_vip AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings_instagram) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE host = 'r.town' AND followings_instagram IS NOT NULL), hn_followed AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings_hn) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE followings_hn IS NOT NULL), hn_vip AS (SELECT DISTINCT unnest(followings_hn) AS user_id FROM followers WHERE host = 'r.town' AND followings_hn IS NOT NULL) SELECT service, segment, total, ROUND(100.0 * synced_1d / NULLIF(total, 0), 1) AS synced_1d_pct, ROUND(100.0 * synced_7d / NULLIF(total, 0), 1) AS synced_7d_pct, stale_30d FROM (SELECT 'twitter' AS service, 'vip' AS segment, COUNT(*)::numeric AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric AS synced_1d, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric AS synced_7d, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR tu.lastsync IS NULL) AS stale_30d FROM twitter_users tu JOIN twitter_vip tv ON tv.user_id = tu.id UNION ALL SELECT 'twitter', 'followed', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE tu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR tu.lastsync IS NULL) FROM twitter_users tu JOIN twitter_followed tf ON tf.user_id = tu.id UNION ALL SELECT 'instagram', 'vip', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR iu.lastsync IS NULL) FROM instagram_users iu JOIN instagram_vip iv ON iv.user_id = iu.id UNION ALL SELECT 'instagram', 'followed', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE iu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR iu.lastsync IS NULL) FROM instagram_users iu JOIN instagram_followed igf ON igf.user_id = iu.id UNION ALL SELECT 'hackernews', 'vip', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR hu.lastsync IS NULL) FROM hn_users hu JOIN hn_vip hv ON hv.user_id = hu.id UNION ALL SELECT 'hackernews', 'followed', COUNT(*)::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE hu.lastsync < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' OR hu.lastsync IS NULL) FROM hn_users hu JOIN hn_followed hf ON hf.user_id = hu.id) s ORDER BY service, CASE segment WHEN 'vip' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END;

spec.title: asp errors
spec.description: HTTP 500 server responses on dotMakeup request handlers, split by route, error type, and method. Use this to spot failing read endpoints or controller regressions.
